message:
feat(runtime): implement deterministic event trace, replay verification, and snapshot export

Add the trace subsystem (bd-2n0.4) with a ring-buffer event recorder,
FNV-1a digest computation for deterministic identity, element-by-element
replay verification against reference sequences, and JSON snapshot export
of live runtime state (regions, tasks, obligations, trace digest).

New files:
- src/runtime/trace.c: ring buffer emission, digest, replay verification,
  snapshot capture, and string helpers for all event/result kinds
- tests/unit/runtime/test_trace.c: 18 unit tests covering emission,
  monotonic sequencing, deterministic digest, replay match/mismatch
  detection (length, kind, entity, aux), snapshot export, and string
  helper coverage

Build integration:
- Makefile: add trace.c to RUNTIME_SRC
- include/asx/asx.h: include runtime/trace.h umbrella header

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -123,7 +123,8 @@ RUNTIME_SRC := \
 	src/runtime/scheduler.c \
 	src/runtime/cancellation.c \
 	src/runtime/quiescence.c \
-	src/runtime/resource.c
+	src/runtime/resource.c \
+	src/runtime/trace.c
 
 CHANNEL_SRC := \
 	src/channel/mpsc.c
